svg.title: Data pipeline architecture diagram
svg.desc: Multi-layer architecture from data sources through ETL, storage, services, agent, and frontend

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of data sources feed into this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What databases or files could be data sources here?')
sendPrompt('What streaming data sources are typical here?')
sendPrompt('What does Airflow do in this ETL pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is PostgreSQL used in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is ChromaDB used for in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Neo4j fit into this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Research Service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the News Service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Risk Service assess?')
sendPrompt('What does the Agent Service orchestrate?')
sendPrompt('What are the trade-offs between Streamlit and Next.js for this frontend?')
